gist.headline: Gemini Flash Lite joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've added Google's new Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite preview to the text API. It's fast, multimodal, and ready to process your massive 1M token contexts.
gist.summary: Added support for Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite preview model to the text generation API.
gist.impact: Developers can now access the lightweight, multimodal Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite model for fast text, image, and audio processing with a 1M token context window.
gist.visual_concept: Gemini is represented by glowing stars. 'Flash Lite' implies speed and lightness. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot discovering a fast, glowing star or crystal representing the new lightweight model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot flying alongside a glowing, fast-moving shooting star. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly, its screen displaying a bright star symbol. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
